name: Stamford Industrial Group, Inc.
summary: Stamford Industrial Group, Inc. manufactures and sells steel counterweights and structural weldments. The company offers profile cuts, stacks and welds, and box enclosure counterweights; steel weldments in various shapes and sizes that include vehicle body parts, such as panels, bumpers, beams, and plates; and technical services, including just-in-time inventory programs, production of kits, and technical assistance services. Its products are used in aerial work platforms, material tele handlers, elevators, and crane and heavy vehicle applications. The company serves original equipment manufacturers in commercial and industrial construction equipment, and elevator industries in the United States. Stamford Industrial Group, Inc. was formerly known as Net Perceptions, Inc. and changed its name to Stamford Industrial Group, Inc. in June 2007. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Stamford, Connecticut. On March 8, 2011, the voluntary petition of Stamford Industrial Group, Inc. for reorganization under Chapter 11 was converted to Chapter 7. It had filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on September 28, 2009. Stamford Industrial Group, Inc. is in liquidation.
